description.ko: 천체와 해양의 경계가 고요하고 반짝이는 무한한 어둠의 공허 속으로 흐려지는 우주의 심연, 그 경이롭고도 오싹한 아름다움을 탐험하세요.
description.en: Explore the haunting beauty of the Cosmic Deep, a region of space where the boundaries between the celestial and the oceanic blur into a silent, shimmering void of infinite darkness.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of VOID-3, a cosmic deep abyss where stars look like bioluminescent particles in a dark matter ocean, swirling nebulae in deep indigo, charcoal, and violet, ancient celestial structures floating in the silent void, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, mysterious and vast atmosphere.
